Back to Shop
Toys

Woolen Ball

(98 reviews)

The Woolen Ball Toy is a timeless favorite for cats and kittens. Made from natural, pet-safe wool, it encourages healthy play, exercise, and mental stimulation. Lightweight and soft, it's perfect for batting, chasing, and carrying around the house.

$5.00

In Stock
Add to Cart

Product Details

More Details About The Product

Our Woolen Ball Toy is crafted from 100% natural wool, making it safe and irresistible for cats. Its lightweight design encourages active play, pouncing, and chasing, helping to keep your cat healthy and entertained.

  • Material: 100% natural wool
  • Size: 2" diameter
  • Recommended for: Cats and kittens of all ages
  • Hand-washable and eco-friendly

Emily C.

"My kitten loves chasing this woolen ball around the house! It's soft, safe, and keeps her busy for hours."

Rajiv S.

"Great quality and perfect size for my adult cat. She bats it all over the living room!"

We offer fast and reliable shipping across the country. Orders are processed within 1–2 business days.

  • Standard Shipping: 3–5 business days
  • Express Shipping: 1–2 business days
  • Easy Returns: 30-day money-back guarantee
